args.code: (()=>{const issues=[];const langIssues=[];const emptyIssues=[];const visualIssues=[];const allText=[];function walk(el,depth){if(depth>20)return;const text=(el.textContent||'').trim();const tag=el.tagName;if(tag==='SCRIPT'||tag==='STYLE'||tag==='NOSCRIPT')return;const rect=el.getBoundingClientRect?el.getBoundingClientRect():null;const hasVisibleChildren=Array.from(el.children).some(c=>{const r=c.getBoundingClientRect?c.getBoundingClientRect():null;return r&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;});const isLeaf=el.children.length===0||!hasVisibleChildren;if(isLeaf&&text.length>0){allText.push({tag,text,class:el.className,id:el.id});const hasTurkish=/[çğıöşüÇĞİÖŞÜ]/g.test(text);const hasEnglish=/[a-zA-Z]{4,}/g.test(text);if(text.length>5){if(hasTurkish&&hasEnglish){langIssues.push({tag,text,class:el.className,id:el.id,reason:'tr+en mix'});}}}if(isLeaf&&text.length===0&&rect&&rect.width>5&&rect.height>5&&['DIV','SPAN','P','H1','H2','H3','H4','H5','H6','TD','LI','SECTION','ARTICLE','HEADER','FOOTER','MAIN','ASIDE','NAV'].includes(tag)){const style=window.getComputedStyle(el);if(style.display!=='none'&&style.visibility!=='hidden'){emptyIssues.push({tag,class:el.className,id:el.id,width:Math.round(rect.width),height:Math.round(rect.height),reason:'visible empty'});}}if(rect&&rect.width>0&&rect.height>0){if(el.scrollWidth>el.clientWidth+2){visualIssues.push({tag,class:el.className,id:el.id,reason:'horizontal overflow',scrollW:el.scrollWidth,clientW:el.clientWidth,overflowText:text.substring(0,80)});}if(el.scrollHeight>el.clientHeight+5&&tag!=='HTML'&&tag!=='BODY'){visualIssues.push({tag,class:el.className,id:el.id,reason:'vertical overflow',scrollH:el.scrollHeight,clientH:el.clientHeight,overflowText:text.substring(0,80)});}}Array.from(el.children).forEach(c=>walk(c,depth+1));}walk(document.body,0);const nullTexts=allText.filter(t=>/[Nn]ull|[Uu]ndefined|NaN|\[object Object\]|placeholder|lorem ipsum|example|sample text|coming soon|TODO|FIXME|temp/i.test(t.text));return JSON.stringify({allTextCount:allText.length,langIssues:langIssues.slice(0,50),emptyIssues:emptyIssues.slice(0,50),visualIssues:visualIssues.slice(0,30),nullTexts:nullTexts.slice(0,30),url:location.href,title:document.title,metaDesc:(document.querySelector('meta[name=description]')||{}).content||'',viewportWidth:window.innerWidth,viewportHeight:window.innerHeight,scrollHeight:document.documentElement.scrollHeight})})()
